name: Guinness Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is adapted for the 1.5 lb Panasonic Bread Machine. It's almost perfected (I think another 1 tablespoon of water and/or 1/2 teaspoon of yeast would benefit it).
Adapted from Bread Machine Baking by Lora Brody and Millie Apter

From: Michelle Dick
